full_text:
Wang Qian 王遷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Qian (王遷)was born in Tianshui Commandery. Succeeded Cang Ci as Administrator of Dunhuang but could never be as good as him. Wang Qian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
